title: Section 14
content: 1[Address].--Every multi-State co-operative society shall have principal place of business and an 2[address, including e-mail address registered in the manner prescribed to which all notices and communications may be sent.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 11 of 2023, s. 5, for "Change of address" (w.e.f. 3-8-2023). 2. Subs. by s. 5, ibid., for "address" (w.e.f. 3-8-2023).
